'''Kid DXo'ln''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] who was an acquaintance of [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and took him to his first visit to [[Little Kessel]] onboard his [[Starship/Legends|starship]], the [[Starfire (Kid DXo'ln)|''Starfire'']].

==Biography==
In [[17 ABY/Legends|17 ABY]] he joined Han and [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] in their attempt to rescue [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] from the [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] [[Nandreeson]], along with [[Zeen Afit]], [[Wynni]] and [[Ana Blue|Sinewy Ana Blue]]. Unknown to Han, Kid's true loyalty lay with Nandreeson. Once the rescue party reached Nandreeson's chamber, Kid turned on Han along with Afit and Wynni. Kid grappled with Lando in Nandreeson's pool during the ensuing struggle and was finally knocked unconscious by Han, with the result that he sank below the pool's surface and [[Death/Legends|drowned]].
